view_definition:
SELECT app.id AS application_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    app.status AS application_status,
    adv.name AS advisor_name,
    adv.email AS advisor_email,
    adv.phone AS advisor_phone,
    adv.department AS advisor_department,
    off.title AS offer_title
   FROM ((applications app
     LEFT JOIN advisors adv ON ((adv.profile_id = app.advisor_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers off ON ((off.id = app.offer_id)))
  WHERE (app.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid));

SELECT app.id,
    'application_status'::text AS type,
    app.offer_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.status,
    app.student_status_seen,
    app.student_status_seen AS is_seen,
    COALESCE(app.status_updated_at, app.created_at) AS status_updated_at,
    COALESCE(app.status_updated_at, app.created_at) AS created_at,
    off.title AS offer_title,
    c.company_name,
    NULL::text AS advisor_name
   FROM ((applications app
     LEFT JOIN offers off ON ((off.id = app.offer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN companies c ON ((c.profile_id = app.company_profile_id)))
  WHERE ((app.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (app.status = ANY (ARRAY['accepted'::text, 'rejected'::text])))
UNION ALL
 SELECT app.id,
    'advisor_assigned'::text AS type,
    app.offer_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.status,
    app.advisor_assignment_seen AS student_status_seen,
    app.advisor_assignment_seen AS is_seen,
    COALESCE(app.advisor_assigned_at, app.created_at) AS status_updated_at,
    COALESCE(app.advisor_assigned_at, app.created_at) AS created_at,
    off.title AS offer_title,
    c.company_name,
    adv.name AS advisor_name
   FROM (((applications app
     LEFT JOIN offers off ON ((off.id = app.offer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN companies c ON ((c.profile_id = app.company_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN advisors adv ON ((adv.profile_id = app.advisor_profile_id)))
  WHERE ((app.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (app.advisor_profile_id IS NOT NULL));

SELECT a.id,
    a.status,
    a.created_at,
    o.title AS offer_title,
    o.company_name
   FROM (applications a
     JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = a.offer_id)))
  WHERE (a.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))
  ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;

SELECT i.profile_id,
    p.email,
    i.name,
    i.nif,
    i.locality,
    i.address,
    i.phone
   FROM (institutions i
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = i.profile_id)))
  WHERE (i.profile_id = auth.uid());

SELECT (n.id)::text AS id,
    n.receiver_profile_id AS advisor_profile_id,
    n.application_id,
    n.type,
    n.title,
    n.message AS description,
    n.message,
    n.created_at,
    n.is_read,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ((COALESCE(s.first_name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(s.last_name, ''::text))) AS student_name,
    o.title AS offer_title
   FROM (((notifications n
     LEFT JOIN applications app ON ((app.id = n.application_id)))
     LEFT JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
  WHERE (n.receiver_profile_id = auth.uid())
UNION ALL
 SELECT ('task_created_'::text || (t.id)::text) AS id,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    t.application_id,
    'task_created'::text AS type,
    'Nova tarefa criada'::text AS title,
    t.title AS description,
    COALESCE(t.description, t.title) AS message,
    t.created_at,
    false AS is_read,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ((COALESCE(s.first_name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(s.last_name, ''::text))) AS student_name,
    o.title AS offer_title
   FROM (((application_tasks t
     JOIN applications app ON ((app.id = t.application_id)))
     LEFT JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
  WHERE (app.advisor_profile_id = auth.uid())
UNION ALL
 SELECT ('task_completed_'::text || (t.id)::text) AS id,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    t.application_id,
    'task_completed'::text AS type,
    'Tarefa concluída'::text AS title,
    t.title AS description,
    COALESCE(t.description, t.title) AS message,
    t.completed_at AS created_at,
    false AS is_read,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ((COALESCE(s.first_name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(s.last_name, ''::text))) AS student_name,
    o.title AS offer_title
   FROM (((application_tasks t
     JOIN applications app ON ((app.id = t.application_id)))
     LEFT JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
  WHERE ((app.advisor_profile_id = auth.uid()) AND (t.completed_at IS NOT NULL));

SELECT app.id,
    app.offer_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.status,
    app.created_at,
    app.motivation_letter_path,
    app.cv_path,
    app.student_presence_confirmed,
    app.student_presence_confirmed_at,
    off.title AS offer_title,
    c.company_name,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    adv.name AS advisor_name,
    adv.email AS advisor_email,
    adv.phone AS advisor_phone,
    adv.department AS advisor_department
   FROM ((((applications app
     JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers off ON ((off.id = app.offer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN companies c ON ((c.profile_id = app.company_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN advisors adv ON ((adv.profile_id = app.advisor_profile_id)))
  WHERE (app.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid));

SELECT app.id AS application_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    app.status,
    app.student_presence_confirmed,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.course,
    s.student_number,
    s.academic_year,
    s.education_institution,
    p.email AS student_email,
    off.title AS offer_title,
    ( SELECT msg.content
           FROM application_messages msg
          WHERE (msg.application_id = app.id)
          ORDER BY msg.created_at DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS last_message,
    ( SELECT msg.created_at
           FROM application_messages msg
          WHERE (msg.application_id = app.id)
          ORDER BY msg.created_at DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS last_message_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM application_messages msg
          WHERE ((msg.application_id = app.id) AND (msg.receiver_profile_id = auth.uid()) AND (msg.read_at IS NULL))) AS unread_count
   FROM (((applications app
     JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers off ON ((off.id = app.offer_id)))
  WHERE ((app.advisor_profile_id = auth.uid()) AND (app.status = 'accepted'::text) AND (app.student_presence_confirmed = true));

SELECT msg.id,
    msg.application_id,
    msg.sender_profile_id,
    msg.receiver_profile_id,
    msg.content,
    msg.created_at,
    msg.read_at,
    sender.email AS sender_email,
    receiver.email AS receiver_email,
        CASE
            WHEN (msg.sender_profile_id = auth.uid()) THEN true
            ELSE false
        END AS is_mine
   FROM ((application_messages msg
     LEFT JOIN profiles sender ON ((sender.id = msg.sender_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles receiver ON ((receiver.id = msg.receiver_profile_id)))
  WHERE is_application_chat_participant(msg.application_id, auth.uid());

SELECT app.id,
    app.offer_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.status,
    app.created_at,
    app.viewed_by_company,
    app.student_status_seen,
    app.student_presence_confirmed,
    app.student_presence_confirmed_at,
    app.motivation_letter_path,
    app.cv_path,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.course,
    s.student_number,
    s.academic_year,
    s.education_institution,
    p.email AS student_email,
    o.title AS offer_title,
    adv.name AS advisor_name,
    adv.email AS advisor_email,
    adv.phone AS advisor_phone,
    adv.department AS advisor_department
   FROM ((((applications app
     JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN advisors adv ON ((adv.profile_id = app.advisor_profile_id)))
  WHERE (app.company_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid));

SELECT app.id,
    app.id AS request_id,
    app.id AS application_id,
    app.offer_id,
    app.teacher_profile_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.cv_path,
    app.motivation_letter_path,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((COALESCE(st.first_name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(st.last_name, ''::text))), ''::text) AS student_name,
    p.email AS student_email,
    st.course,
    o.title AS offer_title,
    COALESCE(c.company_name, o.company_name, 'Empresa'::text) AS company_name,
    COALESCE(app.teacher_status, app.status, 'pending'::text) AS status,
    app.created_at,
    o.location,
    o.work_mode,
    o.duration,
    o.description
   FROM ((((applications app
     LEFT JOIN students st ON ((st.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN companies c ON ((c.profile_id = app.company_profile_id)))
  WHERE (app.teacher_profile_id = auth.uid());

SELECT a.id AS application_id,
    a.company_profile_id,
    a.student_profile_id,
    a.status AS application_status,
    a.created_at AS application_created_at,
    p.email AS student_email,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.student_number,
    s.course,
    s.academic_year,
    s.education_institution,
    o.title AS offer_title
   FROM (((applications a
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = a.student_profile_id)))
     JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = a.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = a.offer_id)));

SELECT inv.id AS invite_id,
    inv.institution_profile_id,
    inv.target_role,
    inv.email,
    COALESCE(s.first_name, t.first_name, inv.first_name) AS first_name,
    COALESCE(s.last_name, t.last_name, inv.last_name) AS last_name,
    COALESCE(t.phone, inv.phone) AS phone,
    s.student_number,
    s.course,
    s.academic_year,
    t.department,
    inv.accepted_at,
    inv.created_at,
        CASE
            WHEN (inv.accepted_at IS NULL) THEN 'pending'::text
            ELSE 'accepted'::text
        END AS invite_status
   FROM (((institution_invites inv
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON (((lower(p.email) = lower(inv.email)) AND (p.role = inv.target_role))))
     LEFT JOIN students s ON (((s.profile_id = p.id) AND (inv.target_role = 'student'::text))))
     LEFT JOIN teachers t ON (((t.profile_id = p.id) AND (inv.target_role = 'teacher'::text))))
  WHERE (inv.institution_profile_id = auth.uid());

SELECT o.id,
    o.company_profile_id,
    o.company_name,
    o.title,
    o.description,
    o.area,
    o.location,
    o.work_mode,
    o.duration,
    o.vacancies,
    o.requirements,
    o.is_active
   FROM (saved_offers so
     JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = so.offer_id)))
  WHERE ((so.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (o.is_active = true));

SELECT profile_id,
    company_profile_id,
    name,
    email,
    phone,
    department,
    created_at
   FROM advisors
  WHERE (company_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid));

SELECT t.id,
    t.application_id,
    t.title,
    t.description,
    t.status,
    t.priority,
    t.due_date,
    t.created_by_profile_id,
    t.assigned_to_profile_id,
    t.completed_at,
    t.created_at,
    t.updated_at,
    app.advisor_profile_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ((COALESCE(s.first_name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(s.last_name, ''::text))) AS student_name,
    p.email AS student_email,
    o.title AS offer_title,
    NULL::text AS company_name
   FROM ((((application_tasks t
     JOIN applications app ON ((app.id = t.application_id)))
     LEFT JOIN students s ON ((s.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
  WHERE (app.advisor_profile_id = auth.uid());

SELECT app.id,
    app.id AS application_id,
    app.teacher_profile_id,
    app.student_profile_id,
    app.company_profile_id,
    app.offer_id,
    app.cv_path,
    app.motivation_letter_path,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((COALESCE(st.first_name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(st.last_name, ''::text))), ''::text) AS student_name,
    p.email AS student_email,
    st.course,
    o.title AS offer_title,
    COALESCE(c.company_name, o.company_name, 'Empresa'::text) AS company_name,
    COALESCE(app.teacher_status, app.status, 'active'::text) AS status,
    app.created_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM application_tasks t
          WHERE (t.application_id = app.id)) AS tasks_count,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM application_tasks t
          WHERE ((t.application_id = app.id) AND (t.status = ANY (ARRAY['completed'::text, 'concluida'::text, 'concluída'::text])))) AS completed_tasks_count,
    (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM teacher_evaluations te
          WHERE ((te.application_id = app.id) AND (te.teacher_profile_id = app.teacher_profile_id) AND (te.status = 'submitted'::text)))) AS has_evaluation,
    (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM teacher_evaluations te
          WHERE ((te.application_id = app.id) AND (te.teacher_profile_id = app.teacher_profile_id) AND (te.status = 'submitted'::text))))) AS has_pending_evaluation
   FROM ((((applications app
     LEFT JOIN students st ON ((st.profile_id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = app.student_profile_id)))
     LEFT JOIN offers o ON ((o.id = app.offer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN companies c ON ((c.profile_id = app.company_profile_id)))
  WHERE ((app.teacher_profile_id = auth.uid()) AND (COALESCE(app.teacher_status, app.status, 'accepted'::text) = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'accepted'::text, 'active'::text, 'in_progress'::text, 'completed'::text])));
